extortion.description: Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Brooklyn, New York, Cemtrex is a global, diversified industrial and manufacturing company that provides a wide array of solutions to meet today's technology challenges. Cemtrex provides manufacturing services of advanced custom engineered electronics, industrial contracting services and monitoring instruments for industrial processes and environmental compliance.company is headquartered in 276 Greenpoint Avenue, Building 8, 2nd Floor, Brooklyn, NY 11222, USA.264 Employees
